name: IBM Guardium
description: Integrates with IBM Security Guardium Data Protection REST API for database activity monitoring, audit reporting, vulnerability assessment, and compliance automation

actions.name: List Audit Reports
actions.description: Retrieve a list of all available audit reports from Guardium including activity, compliance, and vulnerability reports

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: Filter by report type (activity, compliance, vulnerability, anomaly)

actions.name: Run Report
actions.description: Execute a specific audit report and retrieve results with optional date range filtering

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: Unique identifier or name of the report to execute

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for report data (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for report data (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured security policies including audit, access control, and exception policies

actions.name: List Data Sources
actions.description: Retrieve all monitored database data sources registered with Guardium

parameters.name: dbType
parameters.description: Filter by database type (Oracle, DB2, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL)

actions.name: Get Anomaly Events
actions.description: Retrieve anomalous database activity events detected by Guardium threat analytics

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for anomaly query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for anomaly query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Search Activity
actions.description: Search database activity logs for specific SQL operations, users, or access patterns

parameters.name: datasource
parameters.description: Filter by specific data source name

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for activity search (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for activity search (ISO 8601 format)
